entry.title: ZIPP AXS WHEEL SENSOR (WH-TRWZ-C1) — firmware 1.5.2
entry.summary:
ZIPP AXS WHEEL SENSOR WH-TRWZ-C1 — firmware 1.5.2

Part: ZIPPWIZ

Address edge cases where reference pressure was unable to be changed under very specific circumstances

Released: 2025-09-11

entry.title: QUARQ TYREWIZ 2 (WH-TRWZ-E1) — firmware 1.5.2
entry.summary:
QUARQ TYREWIZ 2 WH-TRWZ-E1 — firmware 1.5.2

Part: QUARQ TYREWIZ 2

Address edge cases where reference pressure was unable to be changed under very specific circumstances

Released: 2025-09-11

entry.title: ZIPP AXS WHEEL SENSOR (WH-TRWZ-C1) — firmware 1.5.1
entry.summary:
ZIPP AXS WHEEL SENSOR WH-TRWZ-C1 — firmware 1.5.1

Part: ZIPPWIZ

Please ensure your AXS App is on the latest version from the app store -Update to the “Shake to Wake” feature to bring up both ANT and BLE interfaces.

Released: 2025-02-10

entry.title: QUARQ TYREWIZ 2 (WH-TRWZ-E1) — firmware 1.5.1
entry.summary:
QUARQ TYREWIZ 2 WH-TRWZ-E1 — firmware 1.5.1

Part: QUARQ TYREWIZ 2

Please ensure your AXS App is on the latest version from the app store -Update to the “Shake to Wake” feature to bring up both ANT and BLE interfaces. -Sensor has been made to be more responsive to pressure changes.

Released: 2025-02-10

entry.title: QUARQ TYREWIZ 2 (WH-TRWZ-E1) — firmware 1.1.1
entry.summary:
QUARQ TYREWIZ 2 WH-TRWZ-E1 — firmware 1.1.1

Part: QUARQ TYREWIZ 2

Initial Public Release

Released: 2023-09-21

entry.title: QUARQ TYREWIZ (WH-TRWZ-B1) — firmware 0.16.1
entry.summary:
QUARQ TYREWIZ WH-TRWZ-B1 — firmware 0.16.1

Part: QUARQ TYREWIZ

ANT+ improvements to pressure alerts and firmware version reporting.

Released: 2022-10-06

entry.title: QUARQ TYREWIZ (WH-TRWZ-A1) — firmware 0.16.1
entry.summary:
QUARQ TYREWIZ WH-TRWZ-A1 — firmware 0.16.1

Part: QUARQ TYREWIZ

ANT+ improvements to pressure alerts and firmware version reporting.

Released: 2022-10-06

entry.title: QUARQ TYREWIZ (WH-TRWZ-B1) — firmware 0.15.1
entry.summary:
QUARQ TYREWIZ WH-TRWZ-B1 — firmware 0.15.1

Part: QUARQ TYREWIZ

- Shake2Wake: TyreWiz requires less movement to wake. - Pump2Wake: TyreWiz will wake when inflation is detected. - Automatic In-App Pressure Display: TyreWiz pressure readings will automatically display upon opening the AXS App without any additional user interaction.

Released: 2022-04-14

entry.title: QUARQ TYREWIZ (WH-TRWZ-A1) — firmware 0.15.1
entry.summary:
QUARQ TYREWIZ WH-TRWZ-A1 — firmware 0.15.1

Part: QUARQ TYREWIZ

- Shake2Wake: TyreWiz requires less movement to wake. - Pump2Wake: TyreWiz will wake when inflation is detected. - Automatic In-App Pressure Display: TyreWiz pressure readings will automatically display upon opening the AXS App without any additional user interaction.

Released: 2022-04-14

entry.title: QUARQ TYREWIZ (WH-TRWZ-A1) — firmware 0.11.0
entry.summary:
QUARQ TYREWIZ WH-TRWZ-A1 — firmware 0.11.0

Part: QUARQ TYREWIZ

Add MotoWiz support

Released: 2019-02-18
